item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
files='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md'
word_hits="'$(grep -Hin '"'production' "'$files || true)
timestamp_hits=$(grep -HEn '"'([0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}([T ][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2}(\\.[0-9]+)?)?([Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:?[0-9]{2})?)?)|([A-Z][a-z]{2} [A-Z][a-z]{2} [ 0-9][0-9] [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2} [A-Z]{2,5} [0-9]{4})|((generated|created|updated|timestamp|date)[[:space:]_:-]*[0-9]{10,13})' "'$files || true)
if [ -n "$word_hits" ]; then printf '"'forbidden_word=FAIL\\n%s\\n' \""'$word_hits"; else printf '"'forbidden_word=PASS; matches=0\\n'; fi
if [ -n \""'$timestamp_hits" ]; then printf '"'generated_timestamps=FAIL\\n%s\\n' \""'$timestamp_hits"; else printf '"'generated_timestamps=PASS; matches=0\\n'; fi"

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -eu
files=(longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md)
for file in "${files[@]}"; do [ -f "$file" ]; done
word_hits=$(grep -Hin '"'production' \""'${files[@]}" || true)
timestamp_hits=$(grep -HEn '"'([0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}([T ][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2}(\\.[0-9]+)?)?([Zz]|[+-][0-9]{2}:?[0-9]{2})?)?)|([A-Z][a-z]{2} [A-Z][a-z]{2} [ 0-9][0-9] [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2} [A-Z]{2,5} [0-9]{4})|((generated|created|updated|timestamp|date)[[:space:]_:-]*[0-9]{10,13})' \""'${files[@]}" || true)
if [ -n "$word_hits" ]; then printf '"'forbidden_word=FAIL\\n%s\\n' \""'$word_hits"; else printf '"'forbidden_word=PASS; files=2; matches=0\\n'; fi
if [ -n \""'$timestamp_hits" ]; then printf '"'generated_timestamps=FAIL\\n%s\\n' \""'$timestamp_hits"; else printf '"'generated_timestamps=PASS; files=2; matches=0\\n'; fi"
